user.title: AUX A+ Air Conditioner
user.description: Log in with the phone number and password configured in the AUX A+ app. The login public key is fetched automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect or log in to AUX A+.
error.no_devices: No devices were returned by the AUX A+ account.
error.device_not_found: The selected device was not found.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This AUX A+ device is already configured.
